title: Implement versioned path request batching and Top K pathing
summary: Implement Region coarse pathing, local A star, batched path requests, Top-K candidate path resolution and stale navigation-version rejection.
acceptance: Path requests carry map and navigation versions and stale results are discarded before state mutation
Only bounded Top-K candidates receive exact local pathing in work selection
No actor stores long-lived complete paths across incompatible map versions
100 path benchmark reports requests, rejected stale results, node expansions and queue backlog
